# API Reference

## Config

```python
from iw_generator.core.config import Config

cfg = Config.load("iw.config.toml")
```

## Build

```python
from iw_generator.core.engine import build

site = build(cfg)
```

# Getting Started

Follow these steps to get started.

title: Installation
content:
---
title: "Installation"
tags: ["setup", "install"]
---

# Installation

```bash
pip install iw-generator
```

Then run:

```bash
iw init
iw build
```

title: Advanced Usage
content:
---
title: "Advanced Usage"
tags: ["guide", "advanced"]
---

# Advanced Usage

## Plugins

Enable plugins in config:

```toml
[plugins]
enable = ["toc", "search", "rss"]
```

## Custom Themes

Place templates in `overrides/templates/`.

title: User Guide
content:

title: "User Guide"
tags: ["guide", "usage"]
---

# User Guide

## Configuration

Edit `iw.config.toml` to configure your site.

## Writing Content

Create `.md` files in the `content/` directory.

## Building

```bash
iw build
```
